quoteLast: Carvalho's words of command had ceased echoing through the cloisters, and the men's heels were already resounding on the stones outside.  Some one threw open the western doors of the chapel, and a wave of warm air, heavy with the scent of orange-blossom, surged into the cool dimness to mingle itself with the lingering fragrance of the incense.  The captain looked out.
